canonical_definition: ArgKP21 is a prior key point extraction benchmark consisting of crowd-sourced arguments on controversial topics with human-created gold key points and argument-to-key-point mappings.
papers: Does Localization Inform Unlearning? A Rigorous Examination of Local Parameter Attribution for Knowledge Unlearning in Language Models
Introducing Spotlight: A Novel Approach for Generating Captivating Key Information from Documents
